notes: Battle of Khanwa : Babar emerged victorious against Rana Sanga. Battles of Babar - First Battle of Panipat (1526) : Babar defeated Ibrahim Lodi. Battle of Chanderi (1528): Babar won against Madiniray. Battle of Ghaghra (1529): Babar triumphed over Mahmud Lodi.
Zahiruddin Muhammad. Real names of some Mughal emperors include: Humayun - Nasir al-Din Muhammed, Akbar - Jalal- ud-din Muhammad Akbar, Jahangir - Muhammad Salim, Aurangzeb - Muhi-ud-din-Muhammad.
Babur. He was a descendant of Genghis Khan and Timur, founded the Mughal Empire in northern India .
Babur (1526-1530): The first Mughal emperor, succeeded to the throne of Ferghana in 1494, when he was only 12 years old.

Humayun - The second ruler of the Mughal empire. The Afghan soldier Sher Shah Suri defeated him at the war in Chausa 1539 and Kannauj in 1540. Humayun was the first person who developed a citadel in Delhi, named as “Din Panah”.
Ibrahim Lodi. The First Battle of Panipat was fought in 1526. Second Battle of Panipat (1556): Hemu Vikramaditya and Akbar . Third Battle of Panipat (1761): Marathas and Ahmad Shah Abdali.
Babur. He was the first Timurid ruler who, after his conquest of Kabul (1507), assumed the title of Padshah which means "king of kings" or "emperor in persian".
Uttar Pradesh. Aram Bagh - Built by Babur in in Agra. Monuments Built by Babur: The avenue garden in Kabul, the Panipat Mosque and the Kabuli Bagh Mosque.
Agra. On December 26, 1530, Babur died at Agra. His body was first laid at Arambagh in Agra but was later taken to Kabul, where it was buried.
